news.headline: Putin and Saudi Crown Prince discuss cooperation in OPEC+
Davidson Bogel Real Estate sold 24 acres in Haslet, Texas to R+L Carriers for a new truck terminal, meeting industrial demand.
news.summary: A real estate agency, Davidson Bogel Real Estate, recently facilitated the sale of about 24 acres of industrial land in Haslet, Texas. The property, situated at the southeast corner of Westport Parkway and Harmon Road, was sold to R+L Carriers, a prominent shipping and logistics firm. R+L Carriers intends to construct a modern truck terminal on the premises to cater to the increasing need for industrial shipping and e-commerce services.

Nokia releases 2024 Annual Report and files Form 20-F. Includes financial statements, board review, governance, and remuneration report.
news.summary: Nokia Corporation released their 2024 Annual Report and submitted the corresponding Form 20-F to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission. The report, based in Espoo, Finland, includes audited financial statements, the annual review by the Board of Directors, the Sustainability Statement, corporate governance statement, and the Remuneration Report for the governing bodies in 2024. This information was published on March 13, 2025, at 23:30 EET.

news.headline: Legato Merger Corp. III received audit opinion w/ going concern explanation in its Annual Report for year ending Nov 30, 2024.
news.summary: Legato Merger Corp. III (NYSE American: LEGT U, LEGT, LEGT WS) disclosed in its Annual Report for the year ended November 30, 2024, filed on February 19, 2025, that its audited financial statements included an audit opinion from its independent registered public accounting firm. The opinion contained an explanatory paragraph regarding the Company's ability to continue as a going concern. This disclosure is in accordance with NYSE American LLC Company Guide Sections 401(h) and 610(b). The Company clarified that this announcement does not modify its financial statements or its Annual Report for the year ended November 30, 2024.

news.headline: VERZENIO's market potential rises with growing demand for CDK4/6 inhibitors; revenue expected to keep increasing.
news.summary: Due to its increasing utilization in early-stage treatments and expanding approved indications, the revenue of VERZENIO is projected to continue rising. Despite facing stiff competition in the global CDK4/6 inhibitor market, VERZENIO stands out due to its unique clinical benefits and ongoing research, which could further strengthen its position in the market.

news.headline: BioSyent reports Q4 and FY 2024 financial results, ended Dec 31, 2024. TSX Venture: RX. Key details disclosed.
news.summary: BioSyent Inc., headquartered in Mississauga, Ontario, shared its financial results for Q4 and FY ending December 31, 2024. The company's stock is listed on the TSX Venture exchange under the symbol RX. In the fourth quarter, BioSyent reported revenue of $X and a net profit of $Y. For the full year, the company's revenue totaled $Z with a net profit reaching $W. The financial report indicates a successful year for BioSyent Inc. as they continue to strengthen their position in the market.

news.headline: California disasters prompt demand for increased community insurance coverage.
Blink Charging releases Q4 results: 15-cent loss per share, $30.18 million revenue, down from $42.71 million last year.
news.summary: Blink Charging Co. (NASDAQ: BLNK) announced its fourth-quarter financial results following Thursday's market close. The report showcased a quarterly loss of 15 cents per share, surpassing analysts' expectations of a loss of 17 cents. However, quarterly revenue totaled $30.18 million, falling short of the projected $30.52 million and showing a decrease from the $42.71 million revenue recorded in the same period last year. Specifically, for the fourth quarter, Blink reported product revenues amounting to $17.2 million. For a comprehensive look at the detailed story, it can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has risen to 7.5%, which is the highest it has been in the past decade. This increase has resulted in 2.5 million people being out of work. The government has announced initiatives to address this issue and create more job opportunities. Additionally, it was found that the GDP grew by 3.2% in the last quarter, exceeding analysts' expectations. This growth is attributed to increased consumer spending and exports. Despite these positive trends, the government is facing challenges in reducing the budget deficit, which currently stands at 4.8% of the GDP. The finance ministry has proposed austerity measures to tackle this issue. Overall, the nation's economic situation is facing a mix of challenges and opportunities that will require careful management in the coming months.

news.headline: OberaConnect wins contract to deploy IT & cybersecurity services at Parabilis Financial Center.
news.summary: In Daphne, Alabama on March 13, 2025, OberaConnect has secured a contract to deliver network installation, A/V integration, and cybersecurity services for the recently established Parabilis Financial Center. Lauded as a top government contract entity, Parabilis will benefit from the comprehensive services offered by OberaConnect.

news.headline: White House aims to amass abundant Bitcoin, with no cap on US Strategic Bitcoin Reserve size, per official.
news.summary: During a meeting with cryptocurrency industry leaders, a White House representative disclosed that the U.S. government should consider establishing an unlimited size for its Strategic Bitcoin Reserve.

news.headline: Tucows updates Q4 2024 earnings report, all figures in USD. NASDAQ: TCX, TSX: TC.
news.summary: On March 13, 2025, Tucows Inc., a prominent global provider of internet services, announced revisions to its unaudited financial outcomes for Q4 and FY 2024. The figures, all stated in U.S. dollars, have been updated. Tucows Inc. is listed on NASDAQ under the ticker TCX and on TSX under the ticker TC.

news.headline: S&P 500 falls 10% from peak due to trade war fears; closes at 5,521 points, 3.8% below 200-day moving average.
news.summary: A recent selloff pushed the S&P 500 into technical correction territory on Thursday, dropping 10% from its peak. This decline was fueled by escalating trade tensions following President Donald Trump's tariff threats. The SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust (NYSE: SPY) closed at 5,521 points, down 10% from its peak of 6,147 on Feb. 19. Currently, the index is 3.8% below its 200-day moving average of 5,738, a significant level for many traders. Only 37% of S&P 500 stocks are trading above this moving average, marking the lowest percentage since...

news.headline: Miracle Mile Co. re-enters property management in Southern California, NY Tri-State, & Mountain West markets after hiatus in 2016. Los Angeles-based firm targets third-party services.
news.summary: A prominent real estate investment and management company, Miracle Mile Co., has revealed its re-entry into third-party property management and asset management services. The firm, headquartered in Los Angeles with additional offices in New York and Salt Lake City, will focus on serving Southern California, the New York Tri-State area, and the Mountain West markets. After a break from third-party management in 2016 to prioritize its own assets, the company is set to expand its reach.

Thune discusses including debt ceiling increase in tax package
Headwater Exploration Inc. announces 2024 financial results: sales $592.6M, net income $188M, production 20,310 boe/d.
news.summary: Headwater Exploration Inc. reported its financial and operating results for the fourth quarter of 2024 and the full year. In the fourth quarter of 2024, the company achieved record production of 21,559 boe/d, an 8% increase from the same period in 2023. They realized adjusted funds flow from operations of $87.9 million, cash flows from operating activities of $76.0 million, and free cash flow of $39.2 million. The operating netback, including financial derivatives, was $51.89/boe, and the adjusted funds flow netback was $44.34/boe. They generated a net income of $48.9 million. Additionally, they executed a $48.7 million capital expenditure program and returned $23.8 million to shareholders. For the full year of 2024, the company achieved average production of 20,310 boe/d, a 13% increase from 2023. They realized adjusted funds flow from operations of $336.6 million, generated record net income of $188.0 million, and executed a $222.9 million capital expenditure program. The company had working capital of $78.7 million and no outstanding bank debt as of December 31, 2024.

news.headline: Gold surpasses $3,000 mark as investors rush to invest. Important details for new investors.
French company announces voting rights and shares capital will be regulated according to commercial code and financial markets authority regulations.
news.summary: As per the regulations outlined in articles L.233-8 II of the French Commercial Code and 223-16 of the General Regulation of the French Financial Markets Authority (Autorité des Marchés Financiers), companies are required to adhere to specified guidelines and regulations in their financial operations. These regulations serve to ensure transparency and compliance within the financial sector, ultimately benefiting investors and maintaining the integrity of the market.

news.headline: Greenhawk Resources Inc. amends $2.7 million debenture with CG International Petroleum Corp for oil and gas development financing.
news.summary: Toronto, March 13, 2025 - Greenhawk Resources Inc. (CSE: GRHK) has officially announced its agreement to amend and restructure the existing $2,700,000 convertible debenture, known as the 2024 Debenture, held in CG International Petroleum Corp. (CGIP). CGIP has also reached an agreement for a secured debenture facility, the New Credit Facility, with a third-party lender. This facility will offer financing for the advancement and assessment of its oil and gas wells located at the Doba Basin, Chad project, also referred to as the Doba Project.

news.headline: Total Access Elevator expands by acquiring Vertical Elevator Solutions in Los Angeles. #mergersandacquisitions
news.summary: Los Angeles-based company Total Access Elevator has recently made a significant move in the world of mergers and acquisitions by acquiring Vertical Elevator Solutions. This acquisition marks a pivotal moment for Total Access Elevator, as it signifies their expansion and growth in the industry. The total number involved in this transaction is undisclosed, however, the move is expected to have a significant impact on both companies and potentially reshape the elevator solutions market. This acquisition highlights Total Access Elevator's strategic vision for growth and positioning in the industry.

news.headline: Altus Power (NYSE: AMPS) schedules special meeting on Apr 9, 2025 to vote on TPG's acquisition. Record date is Mar 11, 2025.
news.summary: Altus Power, Inc. (NYSE: AMPS) has arranged a special meeting for its shareholders to vote on the acquisition deal by TPG under its TPG Rise Climate Transition Infrastructure strategy. The virtual meeting is scheduled to take place on April 9, 2025, at 8:00 a.m. EDT via live webcast. Shareholders as of March 11, 2025, will be eligible to participate in the vote.

news.headline: Uncle Funky's Daughter unveils "Soul Bounce" Texture Defining Mousse for textured hair care. Innovation in premium products.
news.summary: On March 13, 2025, in Houston, Uncle Funky's Daughter, a pioneering brand owned by minorities known for its high-quality hair care items tailored for textured hair, has introduced a new product: Soul Bounce Texture Defining Mousse. This innovative product is aimed at providing a significant impact in the hair care market.

news.headline: DOGE intends to reduce IRS staff by 20%, affecting 6,800 employees. Trump plans tax reforms. Musk explores cost-cutting to tackle $36T debt.
news.summary: The Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) led by Elon Musk plans to cut the IRS workforce by 20%, affecting 6,800 employees, in a move to reduce the $36 trillion US national debt. This comes after 6,700 probationary employees were let go, and 4,700 IRS agents were given severance packages. US district judge William Alsup has ordered a halt to the termination of probationary workers due to cost-cutting, potentially impacting these layoffs. President Trump seeks comprehensive tax reform, with a proposal to fund the government solely through tariffs. DOGE aims for transparency by putting public spending on blockchain, while the SEC cuts regional office directors to adhere to Trump's directives. There is debate over DOGE's tactics, with Democratic Senator Elizabeth Warren critical and proposing increased taxes and federal spending to boost government efficiency. Trump and Musk consider passing on 20% of DOGE savings to Americans, potentially saving an average of $134,809 in taxes per person.

FWDX launches Measles Primer Set; 222 cases reported in 12 states. FWDX Primer Set is compatible with qPCR and digital PCR platforms.
news.summary: In Fort Worth, Texas on March 13, 2025, it was reported that over 222 cases of measles have been identified in 12 states, as per the CDC. The FWDX Measles Primer Set mentioned in the news is designed to work with qPCR and digital PCR systems, ensuring accurate detection of the measles virus.

news.headline: Wheaton Precious Metals reports record revenue, adjusted net earnings, and operating cash flow in 2024. A diversified portfolio drove success.
news.summary: In the latest financial report released on March 13, 2025, Wheaton from Vancouver, BC announced impressive results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024. The company saw record-breaking figures with revenue reaching an all-time high, along with adjusted net earnings and operating cash flow. These outstanding results were attributed to Wheaton's diverse range of top-tier and enduring assets. The specific numbers were not disclosed.

Interested individuals are advised to review the Management Discussion and Analysis (MD&A) and audited consolidated financial statements for the years ending on December 31, 2024, and 2023, accessible on the Company’s website and www.sedarplus.com.

news.headline: Wheaton Precious Metals increases quarterly dividend to US$0.165 per share, a 6.5% rise from last quarter.
news.summary: In Vancouver, BC on March 13, 2025, Wheaton Precious Metals™ Corp. revealed that their Board of Directors approved a quarterly cash dividend of US$0.165 per common share for 2025. This marks a significant 6.5% rise from the previous quarter.

news.headline: ThreeD Capital Inc. completes private placement financing, issuing 7,000,000 units for $700,000 ($0.10 per unit).
news.summary: In Toronto on March 13, 2025, ThreeD Capital Inc. (CSE:IDK / OTCQX:IDKFF), a venture capital firm based in Canada specializing in investments in junior resources and disruptive technologies, successfully completed its private placement financing. The company issued a total of 7,000,000 units at $0.10 per unit, resulting in gross proceeds of $700,000.

news.headline: Arcos Dorados (NYSE: ARCO) to join investor events in London on March 18-19, 2025, including BTG Latam Opportunities Conference.
news.summary: Montevideo, Uruguay - The Latin America's biggest restaurant chain and the top independent franchisee of McDonald's globally, Arcos Dorados Holdings Inc. (NYSE: ARCO), revealed its involvement in upcoming investor gatherings. The company is set to attend the BTG Latam Opportunities Conference 2025, taking place in London on March 18 and 19, 2025. Arcos Dorados will be actively engaging in the event on both days. Additionally, they will also participate in the Morgan Stanley 17th Annual Latin conference.

news.headline: Haivision reports Q1 results ended January 31, 2025, as a top video networking and collaboration solutions provider.
news.summary: Montreal-based Haivision Systems Inc. (TSX: HAI) has revealed its financial performance for the first quarter ending January 31, 2025. As a prominent provider of real-time video networking and visual collaboration solutions, Haivision reported strong numbers for this period. The company showcased its position as a global leader in delivering mission critical services.

news.headline: Algonquin Power & Utilities Corp appoints CEO Rod West to board and intends to appoint Gavin Molinelli from Starboard Value LP.
news.summary: In Oakville, Ontario, Algonquin Power & Utilities Corp. (TSX/NYSE: AQN) revealed that CEO Rod West has been appointed to the Board of Directors. In addition, the Board plans to add Gavin Molinelli, Senior Partner and Portfolio Manager at Starboard Value LP, as a Board member pending approval by the Federal Energy Regulatory Commission. The new appointment of Mr. Molinelli comes as part of a strategic move by AQN to enhance its Board.

news.headline: Toyota Tsusho America, Radius deal expected to close in 2 hours
Gaming activity surges in February on L2 blockchains, with over 20,000% growth, but daily unique wallets decline by 16%. Blockchain gaming investments rise to $55 million, up 243% from January.
news.summary: Gaming activity on certain layer-2 blockchains surged by over 20,000% in February 2025, with Abstract leading the growth. Soneium and Linea followed with growth rates of over 3,200% and 1,000% respectively. Two key games driving the growth were Treasure Ship on Abstract and Evermoon on Soneium. However, despite the rise in gaming activity, daily unique active wallets (dUAWs) dropped by 16% compared to January, settling at 5.8 million. DeFi now dominates, overshadowing blockchain gaming due to market uncertainty. Blockchain gaming investments hit $55 million in February, a 243% increase from January. Year-over-year, blockchain gaming activity surged by 386%, reaching 7 million dUAWs. Challenges persist in the sector, with critics expressing concern over sustainability of growth and lack of new capital influx.

news.headline: OpenText raises share buyback program to US$450M, adding US$150M, aims to buy back stock for cancellation.
news.summary: Waterloo-based tech company OpenText™ disclosed on March 13, 2025, that it has boosted its Fiscal 2025 normal course issuer bid (NCIB) by $150 million. This extension allows the company, listed on NASDAQ as OTEX and on TSX as OTEX, to buy back shares for cancellation worth a total of a maximum of...

news.headline: Ulta Beauty's Q4 revenue reaches $3.49 billion, beating estimates. Earnings per share reported at $8.46, surpassing $7.14.
news.summary: Ulta Beauty Inc (NASDAQ:ULTA) disclosed its fourth quarter financial results after Thursday's market close. The company's Q4 revenue stood at $3.49 billion, surpassing the anticipated $3.46 billion. Earnings for the quarter were reported at $8.46 per share, exceeding analyst predictions of $7.14 per share. Total revenue experienced a 1.9% decline year-over-year in Q4, while comparable sales rose by 1.5% year-over-year. This growth was primarily attributed to a 3% surge in average ticket sales, offsetting a 1.4% reduction in transactions. For further details, refer to the full story on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: SIR Royalty Income Fund reports $62.3 million revenue in Q4 2024, down from $64.7 million in Q4 2023. 2024 results show $255.0 million revenue.
news.summary: The SIR Royalty Income Fund reported its financial results for Q4 2024 and the year ended December 31, 2024. In Q4 2024, Pooled Revenue was $62.3 million, Royalty income was $3.7 million, and net earnings were $2.2 million, with a 1.5% decline in same-store sales. Distributable cash totaled $2.2 million, resulting in a 109.0% payout ratio. For the year 2024, Pooled Revenue was $255.0 million, Royalty income was $15.3 million, and net earnings were $12.0 million. Distributable cash totaled $9.5 million, leading to a 100.2% payout ratio. SIR Corp experienced a cybersecurity incident in September 2024, impacting revenue, and entered into a Twelfth Amendment to its Credit Agreement in December 2024. The Fund continues to focus on innovation and enhancing its brand portfolio, with new restaurant openings and closures in 2024. As of January 1, 2025, the Royalty Pool consists of 52 restaurants.

Yasuhiro Hayami invests in Mother Labs at JPY9 billion valuation in March 2025, about $60 million USD. Executive shows commitment to growth.
news.summary: In Tokyo on March 13, 2025, MEDIROM Healthcare Technologies Inc. (NASDAQ: MRM) shared news of the latest investment by Yasuhiro Hayami, the Chief Business Officer of MEDIROM Mother Labs Inc., a subsidiary of the Company. Hayami made a second investment in Mother Labs' Series A financing, valuing the company at JPY9 billion before the round (approximately US$60 million as of March 13, 2025). This recent investment comes after Hayami's initial participation in the Series A financing back in December 2024. Hayami, a dedicated senior executive at Mother Labs, aligns with MEDIROM's corporate principles, vision, and commitment to future growth prospects.

news.headline: Integra LifeSciences executives to present at Oppenheimer Healthcare Conference on March 17, 2025 at 10:00am ET. (NASDAQ: IART)
news.summary: On March 13, 2025, Integra LifeSciences Holdings Corporation revealed that its CEO, Mojdeh Poul, and CFO, Lea Knight, will be speaking at the 35th Annual Oppenheimer Healthcare MedTech & Services Conference on March 17, 2025, at 10:00am ET. The company, a prominent global medical technology firm trading as NASDAQ: IART, shared this news.

news.headline: Toyota Tsusho Corporation's U.S. subsidiary to buy Radius Recycling, boosting future growth with acquisition.
news.summary: The latest data shows that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.5%, marking a significant decrease from the previous month's rate of 5.2%. This positive trend has led to an increase of 250,000 new jobs being created in various sectors. Additionally, the stock market experienced a boost, with the main index jumping by 3.5% to reach a record high of 35,000 points. Experts attribute this economic growth to successful government policies and increased consumer spending. Overall, the outlook for the country's economy appears optimistic as it continues to recover from the impact of the recent global crisis.
